title: [$250] Remove SCAN_TEST_TOOLTIP from Create Expense Scan flow

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

body:
## Description Remove the `SCAN_TEST_TOOLTIP` Product Training tooltip that appears in the Create Expense → Scan flow, along with its follow-up tooltips for manager selection and confirmation. **What to remove:** 1. **`SCAN_TEST_TOOLTIP`** — the tooltip on the Scan tab that says "Scan our test receipt to see how it works!" with "Try it out" / "No thanks" buttons 2. **Follow-up tooltips** — `scanTestTooltip.manager` ("Choose our test manager to try it out!") and `scanTestTooltip.confirmation` ("Now, submit your expense and watch the magic happen!") 3. **Fake receipt flow** — `setTestReceiptAndNavigate()` in `useReceiptScan.ts`, the `setTestReceipt` action in `src/libs/actions/setTestReceipt/index.ts`, and the `fake-receipt.png` asset 4. **Translation keys** — all entries under `scanTestTooltip` in `src/languages/en.ts` (and other language files) 5. **Tooltip config** — the `SCAN_TEST_TOOLTIP` entry in `src/components/ProductTrainingContext/TOOLTIPS.ts` **Key files:** - `src/components/ProductTrainingContext/TOOLTIPS.ts` - `src/pages/iou/request/IOURequestStartPage.tsx` - `src/pages/iou/request/step/IOURequestStepScan/hooks/useReceiptScan.ts` - `src/libs/actions/setTestReceipt/index.ts` - `src/languages/en.ts` - `assets/images/fake-receipt.png` **Note:** This is separate from the TestDrive onboarding modal. The Manager McTest backend flow (`RespondAsManagerMcTest.php`, `ManagerMcTest.php`) should remain intact — only the frontend tooltip-driven test receipt flow is being removed. **Slack thread:** https://expensify.slack.com/archives/D0AM4G91P6U/p1773348513716139
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @ChavdaSachin

title: [$250] Add confirmation dialog to bulk pay to prevent accidental reimbursement

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Internal
labels.description: Requires API changes or must be handled by Expensify staff

labels.name: NewFeature
labels.description: Something to build that is a new item.

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

body:
**Tracking issue:** https://github.com/Expensify/Expensify/issues/620708 ## Problem When users bulk-pay expense reports from the Search tab, the system silently uses the workspace's `lastPaymentMethod` and triggers reimbursement **without any confirmation or warning**. If `lastPaymentMethod` is already set (which it is after any prior payment), clicking "Pay" on bulk-selected reports fires immediately — no payment method display, no "are you sure?" prompt. This causes accidental reimbursements, particularly during migrations when aged, previously-reimbursed reports surface on To-Do lists. ## Expected Behavior Bulk pay should always display a dialog requiring confirmation on payment method used. This should apply regardless of whether `lastPaymentMethod` is already set. For simplicity, we can just reuse the existing bulk pay confirmation modal. It's currently only shown when the user hasn't paid before (and no lastPaymentMethod set). We don't want to change the experience of paying anywhere except for bulk pay. https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/5e7cad5f-16a7-4882-8d34-bb5c83c32ee5 ## Current Code Path 1. User selects reports → clicks "Pay" in `SearchBulkActionsButton.tsx` 2. `getPayOption()` in `src/libs/actions/Search.ts` checks if every selected report's policy has `lastPaymentMethod` set 3. If yes → `isFirstTimePayment=false` → Pay button has no submenu, clicking it calls `onBulkPaySelected(undefined)` directly in `src/hooks/useSearchBulkActions.ts` 4. `onBulkPaySelected` resolves payment method per-item via `getLastPolicyPaymentMethod()`, builds `PaymentData[]`, and calls `payMoneyRequestOnSearch()` — no confirmation dialog anywhere in this path 5. `payMoneyRequestOnSearch` sends `PAY_MONEY_REQUEST_ON_SEARCH` API command immediately ## Proposed Solution Add a confirmation dialog to `onBulkPaySelected` in `src/hooks/useSearchBulkActions.ts` (around lines 546-680). Before building the `paymentData` array and calling `payMoneyRequestOnSearch`, show a modal that requires explicit user confirmation on payment method. We also need to consider restricting bulk pay to a single workspace or single report type to avoid complexity with multi-workspace/multi-type scenarios. ## Debugging Info - FullStory recording: https://app.fullstory.com/ui/o-1WN56P-na1/session/6553482153689515839:6217744384821814442!5556498591218861780 (see 49-minute mark) - Example affected report: R00FWKsKkTF3 (Long ID: 3388979033658921) - Related closed issues: https://github.com/Expensify/Expensify/issues/608462, https://github.com/Expensify/Expensify/issues/615738
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @MarioExpensify
Upwork Automation - Do Not Edit
  • Upwork Job URL: https://www.upwork.com/jobs/~022040990130870170990
  • Upwork Job ID: 2040990130870170990
  • Last Price Increase: 2026-04-06
